alert_title: [CRITICAL] Payments API 5xx error rate exceeded threshold

related_events.title: Database connection pool exhausted
related_events.text: payments-api postgres connection pool at 100/100, requests queuing

related_events.title: Checkout conversion drop
related_events.text: Checkout conversion rate dropped 62% in the last 5 minutes

related_events.title: p99 latency spike
related_events.text: Request timeouts climbing — p99 latency now 28s (baseline 180ms)

comments.message: On-call picking this up. v2.4.0 deployed at 03:38, suspicious timing.
Postgres connection count plateaued at pool_max — connection leak signature.
Rollback complete. Connections draining. Recovery confirmed. Filing post-mortem.
